creator: fidaj@ukr.net
text:
(In reply to Pawel Pekala from comment #7)
> Port build fine in my testing. There are however minor things to fix:
> dirrmtry is deprecated, spaces instead of tabs, PORTVERSION and 
> DISTVERSION can be used together. Please test your work before
> submitting with ports-mgmt/portlint, portlint -abt will flag all
> things mentioned.

ok.
Every time I learn something new :)
